name: deploys_list
description: List all deploys for a service. Returns deploy IDs, statuses, commit information, and timestamps. Supports filtering by status and date range.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: The service ID to list deploys for.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: created, build_in_progress, update_in_progress, live, deactivated, build_failed, update_failed, canceled, pre_deploy_in_progress, pre_deploy_failed.
